alkylation reagent: Afterwards iodoacetamide was added (1 μL of 200 mM IAA)
alkylation concentration: Afterwards iodoacetamide was added (1 μL of 200 mM IAA)
cleavage agent: incubated for 14 h at 37 °C with MS-grade trypsin (Promega, Madison, WI, USA)
instrument: Single-run proteome analysis was performed on a Qexactive HF mass spectrometer
labeling: we used a chromatin-directed proteomic approach
reduction reagent: 1 μL of 100 mM DTT was added to the samples
reduction concentration: 1 μL of 100 mM DTT was added to the samples
